doc: Maps the SBRM codes returned by the Fano-Constraint Classifier (predicted_code = 'sbrm_<NNNN>') to their human-readable LodgeiT-AU taxonomy names. The code is the stable identifier; the leaf_atom / leaf_english is the most-specific human label; ancestry_* traces the code's inheritance chain up to the macro_family (assets / liabilities / equity / revenue / expenses).
